description: Gestion documentaire immobilière belge pour lots et immeubles avec composants génériques, dates d'expiration et alertes visuelles

userStories.title: Migration DB — Étendre property_document_type avec les types belges
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add Belgian-specific document types to the property_document_type enum so that lots and buildings can have PEB, electrical conformity, gas, smoke detectors, boiler maintenance, elevator, fuel tank, condo rules, asbestos, and energy audit document types
acceptanceCriteria: New enum values added: certificat_peb, conformite_electrique, conformite_gaz, detecteurs_fumee, entretien_chaudiere, controle_ascenseur, citerne_mazout, inventaire_amiante, audit_energetique
Migration runs without error on linked DB
npm run supabase:types regenerates database.types.ts with new enum values
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Migration pushed, types regenerated, lint passes. tsc OOM documented in MEMORY.md.

userStories.title: Généraliser DocumentSlot et DocumentChecklist — composants agnostiques
userStories.description: As a developer, I want generic document components that work with any document type (contract, property) so that the same UI code is reused for leases, lots, and buildings. Move core logic into components/documents/ with generic types. Lease components become thin wrappers.
acceptanceCriteria: New generic components: components/documents/document-slot-generic.tsx and document-checklist-generic.tsx
DocumentSlotGeneric props accept string-based document types instead of ContractDocumentType
DocumentChecklistGeneric accepts slot configs + file state as props, renders recommended/autre sections
Existing lease DocumentChecklist/DocumentSlot refactored to use generic components (thin wrappers)
Lease document flow works identically as before (no visual regression)
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created components/documents/ with types.ts, document-slot-generic.tsx, document-checklist-generic.tsx, index.ts. Lease components refactored to thin wrappers. Also added optional section in generic checklist. Lint passes.

userStories.title: Hook usePropertyDocumentUpload — upload pour property_documents
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a hook that handles file upload to the property-documents API so that lots and buildings can upload documents with slot organization, progress tracking, and expiry date support.
acceptanceCriteria: New hook: hooks/use-property-document-upload.ts
Accepts entityType ('lot' | 'building'), entityId, and slotConfigs as params
Uploads to /api/property-documents/upload with correct buildingId/lotId
Supports expiry_date per file
Returns slots state, progress, addFilesToSlot, removeFileFromSlot, uploadFiles
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created hooks/use-property-document-upload.ts. Supports entityType, slot configs, expiry dates. Uploads to /api/property-documents/upload. Lint passes.

userStories.title: Slot configurations pour lots et immeubles
userStories.description: As a developer, I want slot config arrays for lot documents and building documents with Belgian-specific types, labels, icons, recommended badges, and expiry metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: New file: lib/constants/property-document-slots.ts
LOT_DOCUMENT_SLOTS with 6 types: certificat_peb (rec), conformite_electrique (rec), conformite_gaz, detecteurs_fumee (rec), entretien_chaudiere, autre
BUILDING_DOCUMENT_SLOTS with 7 types: certificat_peb (rec), controle_ascenseur, citerne_mazout, reglement_copropriete, inventaire_amiante, audit_energetique, autre
Each slot has: type, label, recommended, allowMultiple, hint, icon, hasExpiry, defaultValidityYears
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created lib/constants/property-document-slots.ts with LOT_DOCUMENT_SLOTS (6 types) and BUILDING_DOCUMENT_SLOTS (7 types). Includes hasExpiry and defaultValidityYears metadata.

userStories.title: Expiry date input + alertes visuelles dans DocumentSlotGeneric
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see visual alerts when a document is close to expiring or already expired so that I can take action to renew it.
acceptanceCriteria: DocumentSlotGeneric accepts optional hasExpiry prop
When hasExpiry=true, shows a date picker input for expiry date
Badge 'Expire bientôt' (orange) when <3 months away
Badge 'Expiré' (red) when past expiry date
Badge 'Valide' (green) when valid with date shown
Expiry date passed to upload hook for storage in property_documents.expiry_date
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Added hasExpiry, expiryDate, onExpiryDateChange props to DocumentSlotGeneric. getExpiryStatus() computes valid/expiring_soon/expired with fr-BE date formatting. Date input shown below hint when hasExpiry=true and hasFiles. Badge shown in compact mode too. Lint passes.

userStories.title: Step Documents dans wizard création/édition de lot — DONE
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a Documents step in the lot creation and edit wizards so that I can upload PEB certificates, electrical conformity, etc. during lot setup.
acceptanceCriteria: lotSteps updated: Documents step (Paperclip icon) inserted before Confirmation
Lot creation wizard renders DocumentChecklistGeneric with LOT_DOCUMENT_SLOTS at step 4
Lot edit wizard renders documents with existing docs pre-loaded
Documents uploaded on form submission via usePropertyDocumentUpload
Navigation works: documents preserved across step changes
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)

userStories.title: Step Documents dans wizard création/édition d'immeuble
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a Documents step in the building creation and edit wizards so that I can upload elevator certificates, condo rules, etc.
acceptanceCriteria: buildingSteps updated: Documents step inserted before Confirmation
Building creation wizard renders DocumentChecklistGeneric with BUILDING_DOCUMENT_SLOTS
Documents uploaded on form submission via usePropertyDocumentUpload
Navigation works across steps with documents preserved
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Added Documents step to building wizard. Modified server action to return result instead of redirect, enabling client-side document upload + redirect. Lint passes.

userStories.title: Section Documents dans page détails lot et immeuble
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see and manage documents on the lot and building detail pages so that I can upload, view, and delete documents after creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Lot detail page shows DocumentChecklistGeneric with existing docs from property_documents
Building detail page shows DocumentChecklistGeneric with existing docs
Can upload new documents from detail page
Can delete documents (soft delete via archive)
Expiry alerts visible on detail pages
Documents fetched via PropertyDocumentService
Typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes: Created PropertyDocumentsPanel component in components/documents/. Integrated in both lot and building detail pages Documents tab, above intervention documents. Panel fetches existing docs from API, organizes by slot type, supports upload + delete + expiry alerts. Lint passes.
